COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-17-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard #7156 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Attorney, Robert Perkiss, appearing on behalf of Plaintiff, Charles Siims, Trustee of Egghead Inc., a Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Bart Von Zastrow, is present.

Defendants, Business Software Solutions, Cumetrix Data System, and Michigan Microcomputer Supply, are not present.

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assign from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Counsel informs Court that the answer defendat, De Jarnett Sales Inc. and cross complaint, Sunrise Technology & trading, settled. Plaintiff's request to dismiss the cross complaint is GRANTED without prejudice. The Court sets an OSC re dismissal as to the answer defendant, De Jarnett Sales Inc., on March 4, 2008 at 10:00 a.m. in Dept. 212.

Bart Von Zastrow is sworn and examined under direct examination by Robert Perkiss. The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1: Account Receivable Ledger...................................... ID/EV

The Court after hearing the testimony and evidence presented by the plaintiff, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the above-named Defendants as follows:

Defendant, Business Software Solutions, shall pay plaintiff the sum of $6,088.67.
Defendant, Cumetrix Data System, shall pay plaintiff the sum of $42,230.74.
Defendant, Michigan Microcumputer Supply, shall pay plaintiff the sum of $31,726.42. For a total judgment in the sum of $80,045.83. Said amount is severally as to all three defendants. The amount of cost is waived by the plaintiff.

Counsel stipulates for the return of the Exhibits. Plaintiff's counsel is to submit a proposed Judgment to the Court for signature.
